name: The Fabled Peggulsus
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>轟</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ごう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>獣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ペガラサス
desc: When this card is discarded to the GY: You can Special Summon it in face-down Defense Position. When this card is flipped face-up: You can reveal 1 "Fabled" monster in your hand; send 1 "Fabled" monster from your Deck to the GY.
mnst_eff: When this card is discarded to the GY: You can Special Summon it in face-down Defense Position. When this card is flipped face-up: You can reveal 1 "Fabled" monster in your hand; send 1 "Fabled" monster from your Deck to the GY.
eff: When this card is discarded to the GY: You can Special Summon it in face-down Defense Position. When this card is flipped face-up: You can reveal 1 "Fabled" monster in your hand; send 1 "Fabled" monster from your Deck to the GY.

jp_sets.set: Duel Terminal - Pulse of the Trishula!!
Duel Terminal Chronicle 3 - Chapter of Destruction

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
